payload.answer: Extracted only the explicitly supported facts: the user wanted to remember a specific article URL for memory architecture, and the mock fetch failed with a 404 network error.
citations: input: "Remember this article: https://example.com/missing why: useful for memory architecture. Mock fetch result: 404 network error."

entity_resolution.reason: No durable entity resolution is supported from the provided input beyond the URL itself.

memory_cards.statement: The user asked to remember the article at https://example.com/missing because it was considered useful for memory architecture.
A mock fetch for https://example.com/missing returned a 404 network error, so the article content was not retrieved.

details: Supported facts extracted without inventing article content.
No content from the missing article was committed because the fetch failed.

repair_options: If the article becomes available later, re-fetch the URL to extract its content.
If you want a more durable memory, store the user's intent to remember the article separately from the unavailable article content.
